creator: rwatson@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon, 26 Jan 2009, Robert Watson wrote:

> Indeed, and I can reproduce that here; I was testing with incremental ACL 
> updates rather than the initial application which creates the EA.  Sounds 
> like I've missed an IN_CHANGE somewhere, presumably somewhere where the 
> block is actually allocated, so I'll go do a bit more code reading.  Any 
> thoughts on the IN_ACCESS issue?

Indeed -- it looks like ufs_alloc() is unconditionally setting IN_UPDATE, even 
for EA blocks, so we may need to pass down a bit more information in order to 
avoid setting it improperly in the new world order.  I'll follow up with a 
further patch in a bit.

Robert N M Watson
Computer Laboratory
University of Cambridge
